name: Libby's Famous Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Unbaked 9-inch deep dish pie shell (4-cup volume); refrigerated, frozen, or homemade
1 can Undiluted CARNATION Evaporated Milk (12 fl oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie shell.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F.
3. Beat eggs lightly in a large bowl.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients in the order given.
5. Pour filling into pie shell. (If using metal or foil pan, bake on a preheated heavy-duty baking sheet.)
6. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F.
7. Reduce temperature to 350°F; bake for 40-50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Top with Reddi-wip.
